title: Short title
doc_html:
§563.4. Short title

            This Chapter shall be referred to and may be cited as "The Remy Mann Act".

            Acts 2024, No. 64, §1, eff. July 1, 2024.
doc_text:
§563.4.  Short title
This Chapter shall be referred to and may be cited as "The Remy Mann Act".
Acts 2024, No. 64, §1, eff. July 1, 2024.
